name: agent-blocks
description: Skill-shaped blocks that compose into deterministic DAG workflows for agents.

scripts.validate:workflows: for f in workflows/*.workflow.json; do cli/bin/blocks validate "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.audit:examples: for f in examples/runs/current/*.run.json; do cli/bin/blocks audit "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.ci: npm test && npm run validate:workflows && npm run plan:triage && npm run audit:examples && npm run check:protocol
scripts.check:protocol: node docs/blocks-protocol-check.mjs && node docs/blocks-protocol-html.mjs PROTOCOL.md | cmp - blocks-protocol.html
